prompt: MANDATORY: Call the messaging_check_inbox tool NOW to check for unread messages. If there are unread messages, read them carefully and act on each one: reply to questions, execute tasks, and report results back to the sender using messaging_send. If a message asks you to contact another agent, use messaging_send to reach them. Do NOT just describe what you would do — actually call the tools.

metadata.reason: Periodic inbox check for team messaging
